revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''8-4-130

A watertight cover to a small opening, for example in a buoy body, through which inspection or adjustment of equipment inside may be made.


Note 1:

The German term Handloch is used for such a small opening.


Note 2:

In the U.S.A, the term pocket cover is used for the cover over the opening to the battery pocket.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Inspection cover}}
